introSection: Twister Mountain is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster at Leolandia in Capriate San Gervasio, Lombardy, Italy.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
Twister Mountain is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster at Leolandia in Capriate San Gervasio, Lombardy, Italy.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 4 riders per car.
